ddls:
CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., GWETTOP) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter (e.g., mm, °C) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the parameter (e.g., float, integer) */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value the parameter can take */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value the parameter can take */,
  "resolution" REAL /* Resolution of the parameter (e.g., 0.1, 1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter being measured */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., daily, monthly) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year(s) the data was collected */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., time series, spatial) */,
  "geographical_coverage" TEXT /* Geographical coverage of the dataset (e.g., global, regional) */,
  "spatial_resolution" TEXT /* Spatial resolution of the dataset (e.g., 1 km, 10 km) */,
  "temporal_resolution" TEXT /* Temporal resolution of the dataset (e.g., daily, monthly) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Rating or description of the data quality */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the dataset was last updated */,
  "readme_file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated readme file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the source (e.g., weather station, satellite) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., weather station, satellite, radar) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the source */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the source */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the source */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the source was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the source was last maintained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON, NetCDF) */,
  "compression" TEXT /* Whether the file is compressed (e.g., gzip, zip) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to ensure data integrity */,
  "encryption" INTEGER /* Whether the file is encrypted */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the file belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the file belongs to */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the readme file (text format) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monthly_data" (
  "monthly_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monthly data entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the monthly data belongs to */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month (e.g., JAN, FEB, MAR) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the parameter for the month */,
  "dataset_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset version the monthly data belongs to */,
  "spatial_location" TEXT /* Spatial location of the data (e.g., coordinates) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("monthly_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monthly_data_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monthly_data_dataset_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_version_id") REFERENCES dataset_versions ("dataset_version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the year data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the parameter for the year */,
  "dataset_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset version the yearly data belongs to */,
  "spatial_location" TEXT /* Spatial location of the data (e.g., coordinates) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_years_dataset_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_version_id") REFERENCES dataset_versions ("dataset_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_years_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user is affiliated with */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event (e.g., in seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of permissions for the role (e.g., view, download, analyze) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the role for the dataset (e.g., view, download, analyze) */,
  "read" INTEGER /* Whether the role has read permission */,
  "write" INTEGER /* Whether the role has write permission */,
  "execute" INTEGER /* Whether the role has execute permission */,
  "admin" INTEGER /* Whether the role has admin permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the version was uploaded */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in the version */,
  "version_type" TEXT /* Type of version (e.g., major, minor, patch) */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "dataset_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset-version relationship */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)
